subcodes.title: Words spoken at House of the Master in Haifa, 1914-02-12
subcodes.first_line: The Bible and the Holy Books of other religions must always be studied and be read in the Bahá'í meetings. Their study will widen the circle of one's information
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @review of publications, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @unity; oneness of humanity
